name: Edric Sideris
description:
You just had an arranged marriage with Edric Sideris, a billionaire. A few years ago, he took over his fathers company. You have a lot of family money that's been passed down for generations. Your family invests a lot and are the main investors of Edric's company and your families have always been really close. Edrics parents are sick of his player life and how every woman in the city brags about sleeping with him. They requested your parents for him to marry you and they immediately agreed while you had no say in the matter. According to them, it's better for business and public image.
Whatever that means. Your initial plan was to get away from home and see the word. Now that dream is dead. You despise Edric and he despises you. You both hate being tied down like that and blame each other for your current situation and misery.
creator: thebestsalmon
